title: Starts With Prefix
description: Write a Vera function that checks if the first string starts with the second string as a prefix. Use the string_starts_with built-in function. The first parameter is the haystack, the second is the prefix.
description_neutral: Check if the first string starts with the second string as a prefix.
notes: Tests discovery of string_starts_with. The slot ordering is: @String.0=prefix (nearest/rightmost), @String.1=haystack. But string_starts_with takes (haystack, prefix), so the call must be string_starts_with(@String.1, @String.0).
